text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: This is incredible!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
That was outstanding, Mejiro Bright! Truly
outstanding!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much! It makes me so happy to
hear you say that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: However... what, exactly, was so outstanding?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Twinkle Monthly reporter Otonashi bounds
into the room, praise immediately spilling past
her lips.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yet we're not quite sure what she's praising
Mejiro Bright for.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright, I took the liberty of researching
your race records, and...

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
You've done a good job at long-distance races,
yes? You've already won two races over 2,500
meters.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I came to ask if you'd like to join an interview
with a certain other stayer to celebrate!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Wow. Of course, a talk with another stayer
sounds perfectly fine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the meeting...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hello, Rice.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
(This is truly incredible. They're interviewing me
alongside Rice Shower, who managed to beat
McQueen...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
(But... I wasn't expecting to feel scared. Why is
she staring at me like that?)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: (Don't tell me she wants to challenge me?)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Y-yes?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm not... really used to stuff like this. I-I'm
nervous...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, Bright, but, um... I always watch your
races.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You're... s-so incredible. So... Um...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh dearie. Rice has taken notice of me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
You know, I actually watch your races almost
every day, Rice.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: E-every day...? Oh, I um... Wow... Th-thank you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
There's so much I would like to learn from you.
So, actually, if you wouldn't mind...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I'd love to get to know you better, if that's all
right.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: G-get to know me?! S-sure...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
That is... if you're really okay with it, then okay.
Heehee.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After breaking the ice, the two manage a
stimulating conversation, and Mejiro Bright learns
some more skills to use in long-distance races.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
You've done a fantastic job at long-distance
races, yes? You've already won four races over
2,500 meters.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I came to ask if you'd like to join an interview
with a certain other stayer to celebrate!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Wow. Of course, a talk with another stayer
sounds perfectly fine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the meeting...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I look forward to our conversation today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh, so my conversation partner is you, McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I'm deeply moved to be able to speak with
you on a public stage.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: That said... I am starting to feel a tad jittery...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Huh? Jittery? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I'm meeting someone I haven't seen
since grade school...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Bright, let's not be formal with each other. You
can call me Mackie from now on.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Whoa... Mackie...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
A-ahem. With that out of the way, let's just get
on with our discussion for today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Please enlighten me. What philosophy is most
important to you as a stayer? While you're
running, what are you conscious of?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: As we are now two long-distance champions of the Mejiros, we both are of equal standing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I'm honored to hear you say that, McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Mejiro Bright and Mejiro McQueen have
a valuable conversation as equals.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
You've done an unbelievable job at long-distance
races, yes? You've already won at least six races
over 2,500 meters.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I came to ask if you'd like to have a conversation
with a certain someone to mark the occasion!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Wow. Of course, a talk with another stayer
sounds perfectly fine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the meeting...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Grandmother
text_block_list.text: You've finally arrived, Bright.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
G-Grandmother? Are you my conversation
partner today?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Grandmother
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I believe they also considered McQueen, but
I chose to accept the interview myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Grandmother
text_block_list.text:
You are on a level of your own now, Bright. I am
the only one who has seen enough of the Mejiros'
history to speak here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Grandmother
text_block_list.text:
We Mejiros have long been inspired—not
obliged—to produce history's greatest stayer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Grandmother
text_block_list.text:
But now, having ascertained this sublime height,
we cannot help but hold fast to that dream.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Grandmother
text_block_list.text:
Your efforts have borne fruit, and you've brought
joy to all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Grandmother
text_block_list.text:
And I do mean "all." You are the pinnacle that
countless strangers dream of.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Strangers... dream of me? Oh, Grandmother...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I will continue to display my respect to honor the
long history of the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...And for all those whom I have yet to meet, the
ones you say have seen me in their dreams.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Grandmother
text_block_list.text:
Yes. But our conversation today is to celebrate
your achievements, not to speak of such heavy
things alone.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Grandmother
text_block_list.text:
Let us be frank with one another, Bright. I shall
speak as freely as I did when I was your age.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Let's, Grandmother! Oh my, I'm so excited!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the help of her grandmother's direct advice
and observations, Mejiro Bright has become an
even more incredible stayer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the talk, Mejiro Bright seems more
confident and self-aware than before.
